description_long: This kiosk is a tall, slender rectangular structure with a solid black frame and a square base for stability. The front face features two vertically stacked display panels: the upper panel showcases a tube of cosmetic product, while the lower panel displays a dropper bottle, both set against a clean, modern background. The rest of the structure is solid black with no visible openings, windows, or interactive elements aside from the display area. The kiosk appears to be designed for advertising or informational purposes, likely intended for placement in commercial or public urban environments. The materials suggest a combination of metal or plastic for the frame and base, with glossy printed or digital display surfaces. The overall design is minimalist and modern, emphasizing clean lines and a professional appearance.
description: A tall, slender black kiosk with two vertically stacked display panels on the front, featuring cosmetic product advertisements. The design is minimalist and modern, with a solid base and no visible openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two display panels with cosmetic advertisements and a solid black frame and base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's slim profile and solid black structure with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid black surface with no openings or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the slim, featureless black side.
attribute_signage_type: printed or digital display panels integrated into the front structure, featuring product images and text.
attribute_roof_design: flat, seamless top with no overhangs or decorative elements, matching the minimalist black frame.
